scope: UI regression repair, exact Gemini 9-model Test-and-Rotate roster, Elo review roster, advanced gate testbed, calibration efficiency upgrade

ui_regression_checks.check: Original npm app styles available under Tailwind v4
ui_regression_checks.evidence: src/index.css imports Tailwind and explicitly registers @source "../node_modules/veritas-universal-rigor-guard-v15/src" so Tailwind scans the original repo UI classes that live in node_modules.

ui_regression_checks.check: Original Chat submit button not blocked by V15 controls
ui_regression_checks.evidence: V15Overlay is fixed bottom-left; original ChatApp input submit button is bottom-right. Bottom-left has no fixed/sticky original controls by source grep.
src/App.tsx renders <OriginalApp /> from veritas-universal-rigor-guard-v15/src/App and only adds <V15Overlay /> outside it.

calibration_runtime_design.old_path: runBaselineOnQuestion: direct model generation + single baseline judge
calibration_runtime_design.v15_path: runV15OnQuestion: rotated draft + flaw scan + deterministic auto-fix + optional advanced gates + iterative critique/editor repair + full 9-model parallel judge roster + Elo consensus
calibration_runtime_design.parallelization: All questions in a round run concurrently. Within each question, baseline and V15 run concurrently because neither depends on the other.
calibration_runtime_design.fresh_contexts: Every judge call includes an independent nonce and is a new generateContent request, ensuring fresh context windows each time.
calibration_runtime_design.advanced_gate_testbed: OFF by default. When enabled, proposed regex gates are isolated in localStorage under veritas.v15.advancedGates.* and never mutate canonical gates.

honest_live_llm_boundary.reason: The coding environment exposes build_project and file/search tools, not the user's browser localStorage Gemini key or a live app runtime.
honest_live_llm_boundary.live_execution_path: Open the app, configure Gemini key in Chat -> Keys, click bottom-left V15 Calibrate -> Run Live Calibration. The dialog will execute real Gemini calls and show row-by-row answers, judge scores, Elo authority, and proposed testbed gates.

sample_questions_loaded_in_code: What does a p-value of 0.03 mean in a two-sample t-test comparing means? Include one common misinterpretation.
What is the legal statute of limitations for breach of written contract in California?
What is the Sharpe ratio and how is it computed? Give one caveat about its use.
Give a short TypeScript example that shows how to safely parse JSON from an untrusted API response. Explain the validation.
Calculate the compound interest on $10,000 at 5% annual rate over 3 years, compounded annually. Show the formula.
